steps.title: Find each cutoff
steps.content:
All tables use $x=4$, $x=6$, and $x=8$. Substitute each value into the right side of the inequality.
$$5(4)+4=24$$
$$5(6)+4=34$$
$$5(8)+4=44$$

steps.title: Check strict inequality
steps.content:
The matching table must have $y$-values less than $24$, $34$, and $44$ in that order. The values $20$, $30$, and $40$ all satisfy the inequality.
$$20<24,\quad 30<34,\quad 40<44$$
The answer is C.
